title: Level Z - Simply Swords
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Simply Swords mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Simply Swords mod.

This addon adds level requirements for specific powerful Simply Swords weapons that were not yet covered to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the Simply Swords mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
